loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations for members with data (GIC-01-N3-UPS-01, GIC-01-N4-UPS-02, GIC-01-N5-UPS-03, GIC-01-N8-BPDB-01, GIC-02-N2-BPDB-02, GIC-02-N5-UPS-04). Members GIC-02-N6-UPS-05 and GIC-02-N7-UPS-06 are dark (no data) and will render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations for 7 active feeders; 3 feeders (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06, Solar Incomers) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current_avg for 6 active outgoing feeders; 4 members (UPS-05, UPS-06, Solar Incomer-1, Solar Incomer-2) are dark (no live data) and render as blanks.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event frequency for 6 active outgoing feeders; 4 members (UPS-05, UPS-06, Solar Incomer-1, Solar Incomer-2) are dark (no data) and honest-blanked.
